name: PER_ABSENCE_ATTENDANCES
description: This table holds details of employee absences from work. Records can be entered with PROJECTED dates and later confirmed as actual. Projected absences have no impact on absence balances.

columns.Name: ABSENCE_ATTENDANCE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: PERIOD_OF_SERVICE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_PERIODS_OF_SERVICE table.

columns.Name: LINKED_ABSENCE_ID
columns.Comments: No longer used.

columns.Name: MATERNITY_ID
columns.Comments: ID of the maternity absence type that this absence is associated with.

columns.Name: SSP1_ISSUED
columns.Comments: Indicates whether statutory sick pay was paid.

columns.Name: PREGNANCY_RELATED_ILLNESS
columns.Comments: Indicates if this sickness absence is associated with maternity.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: ABSENCE_ATTENDANCE_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ABSENCE_ATTENDANCE_TYPES_B table.

columns.Name: ABS_ATTENDANCE_REASON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ABS_ATTENDANCE_REASONS table.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_PERSONS table. Identifies the person.

columns.Name: PERIOD_OF_INCAPACITY_ID
columns.Comments: No longer used.

columns.Name: DATE_END
columns.Comments: End date of the absence.

columns.Name: DATE_NOTIFICATION
columns.Comments: Date when the worker notified employer about the absence.

columns.Name: DATE_PROJECTED_END
columns.Comments: Projected end date of the absence.

columns.Name: DATE_PROJECTED_START
columns.Comments: Projected start date of the absence.

columns.Name: DATE_START
columns.Comments: Start date of the absence.

columns.Name: TIME_END
columns.Comments: End time of the absence.

columns.Name: TIME_PROJECTED_END
columns.Comments: Projected end time of the absence.

columns.Name: TIME_PROJECTED_START
columns.Comments: Projected start time of the absence .

columns.Name: TIME_START
columns.Comments: Start time of the absence.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: BATCH_ID
columns.Comments: No longer used.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ABSENCE_CASE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ABSENCE_CASES table.
